goal: Turn a first sales call into a confirmed profile and a usable briefing.
focus_instruction: Prioritize whether Ava Chen should be tracked as a long-term relationship.

existing_people.summary: SaaS founder who cares about ROI and execution speed.

sources.title: 30-minute partnership call
sources.speaker: Riley (note-taker)
sources.content: Ava Chen said she wants a clearer rollout plan, proof of ROI, and a pilot that does not require a big team. Jordan Li asked for two concrete case studies and a lighter implementation path.
